content.body:
Adds Provenance struct and eight new optional fields to kb.Doc:
confidence (EXTRACTED|INFERRED|AMBIGUOUS), promotion_state
(draft|curated|validated|deprecated), classification
(PUBLIC|INTERNAL|CONFIDENTIAL), compartments (map of string→[]string),
provenance (*Provenance), landmark (bool), centrality_score (*float64).

ApplyDefaults() fills safe defaults at read time so legacy files load
without errors. Validate() enforces enum constraints and centrality_score
range. LoadDoc now calls ApplyDefaults automatically.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
content.subject: feat(kb): add new v0.8 fields to Doc struct with ApplyDefaults and validation
